message:
feat(arena): extend FrameArena API and adopt in TextInput/Dashboard

Add alloc_fmt, alloc_iter, new_vec, new_vec_with_capacity to FrameArena.
Adopt arena allocation in TextInput::render() (grapheme collection) and
Dashboard sparkline data (4 Vec<f64> copies per frame). Falls back to
heap allocation when arena is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
